data.title: Kathleen Sherwin appointed as President & CEO of Orbis International, effective immediately. Brings 25+ years of experience.
data.description: Esteemed NGO leader Kathleen Sherwin has officially joined Orbis International to address the increasing global demand for eye care services. Commencing her role as President & CEO, Sherwin's extensive experience of over 25 years will be instrumental in driving Orbis's mission forward. The appointment aims to bolster Orbis's efforts to combat vision impairments worldwide.

data.title: Xi'an starts 2026 Chang'an Lantern Festival with stunning light displays to welcome spring.
data.description: In Xi'An, China on January 12, 2026, the 2026 Chang'an Lantern Festival kicked off with a vibrant lighting ceremony. The event, themed "Thousands of Lanterns Shining on Chang'an and Welcoming Spring with Horses," took place in the historic city of Xi'an. The festival, which has a long-standing tradition, showcased numerous lantern displays to mark the arrival of spring.

data.title: MDxHealth releases 2025 Q4 and full year revenues, gives 2026 guidance, and updates earnout terms with Exact Sciences.
data.description: MDxHealth has announced their preliminary revenues for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company also provided a revenue guidance for 2026. Additionally, MDxHealth disclosed amendments to the earnout terms with Exact Sciences. Specific numerical details were not provided.

data.title: Trybe secures $30M Series A investment from Five Elms Capital to expand globally and develop software.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in London, the prominent company Trybe revealed they have secured a substantial $30 million USD funding in their Series A round from Five Elms Capital. This investment will empower Trybe to broaden its reach on a global scale and enhance the advancement of their software solutions for managing spa, bathhouse, leisure, and activity facilities.

data.title: 600 students from Minnesota will gather at the Minnesota Children's Museum on Jan. 26 for School Choice Week event.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in St. Paul, Minnesota, students from various schools in the state are set to convene at the Minnesota Children's Museum. Approximately 600 students will participate in an event to express their admiration for their respective schools. The gathering aims to highlight the diverse K-12 school choice alternatives available in Minnesota, emphasizing the students' appreciation for their educational institutions.

data.title: Chipotle to offer free double protein on Jan 13 with code PROTEIN. Rewards members can get it via app or site. New High Protein Menu launched.
data.description: Members of Chipotle Rewards program are eligible for a complimentary double protein inclusion in their bowls, burritos, and salads by using the code PROTEIN through the Chipotle app, website, and Chipotle.ca on Tuesday, January 13. Chipotle's recently launched High Protein Menu expands the options for customers to enhance their protein intake.

data.title: OnePint.ai partners with IPSY to provide AI-powered inventory platform for real-time visibility and fulfillment. Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: OnePint.ai and IPSY have joined forces to introduce real-time visibility, intelligent fulfillment, and scalable inventory orchestration across IPSY's subscription and ecommerce activities. This collaboration, initiated on January 12, 2026, in Andover, Massachusetts, is set to revolutionize IPSY's operations. IPSY, recognized as one of the world's largest subscription-based companies, is poised to benefit significantly from this strategic alliance, improving efficiency and enhancing customer satisfaction.

data.title: Rumble secures exclusive video & live streaming rights for The Dan Bongino Show starting Feb 2, 2026; audio available on major podcast platforms.
data.description: In Longboat Key, Florida, on January 12, 2026, Rumble Inc. (NASDAQ: RUM) revealed a significant partnership with The Dan Bongino Show. The agreement involves exclusive video and live streaming distribution rights for Rumble, making it the sole platform to broadcast the daily live stream of the show. Dan Bongino is set to return to podcasting when the show relaunches on February 2, 2026. Apart from the video aspect, the audio-only version will be accessible on various leading podcast platforms. Furthermore, Westwood One is appointed as the exclusive sales partner for The Dan Bongino Show.

data.title: Dar Global and The Trump Organization open $1bn Trump Plaza Jeddah, their third collaboration in Saudi Arabia.
data.description: In JEDDAH, Saudi Arabia, on Jan. 12, 2026, global luxury real estate developer Dar Global (LSE: DAR) revealed the commencement of Trump Plaza Jeddah. This partnership with The Trump Organization in Saudi Arabia is Dar Global's third collaboration with the company.
